# jellyfin_branding_configuration (Resource)

Manages the Jellyfin branding configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "jellyfin_branding_configuration" "example" {
  login_disclaimer      = ""
  custom_css            = ""
  splashscreen_enabled  = false
  splashscreen_location = ""
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `custom_css` (String) Custom CSS content.
- `login_disclaimer` (String) The login disclaimer text.
- `splashscreen_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the splash screen is enabled.
- `splashscreen_location` (String) The splash screen location.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier. Always set to `branding` for this singleton resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import jellyfin_branding_configuration.example singleton
```
